steps.title: Spot the reversal in judgment
steps.content: The key signal is the arc from the savant's harsh initial assessment—dismissing the man as “coxcombical” with an “absurd ribbon” and mere “smart banter”—to his shock upon learning the man is actually Sir Humphry Davy. This reversal is the passage's entire point.

steps.title: Apply the reversal to the choices
steps.content: Option B—”presents an account of a misunderstanding”—captures exactly what unfolds: initial false judgment meeting unexpected reality. The other options focus on unrelated aspects or misidentify the passage's purpose. That matches choice B — B is correct.
